User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the Bullsara platform, including both regular customers and administrators.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login.

role.description: The role of the user within the system, either 'user' for customers or 'admin' for administrators.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user account was created.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: Represents a single luxury car available for purchase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Product entity.

title.description: The descriptive title of the product.

carModel.description: The model name of the luxury car.

year.description: The manufacturing year of the car.

description.description: A detailed description of the car.

images.description: An array of URLs pointing to images of the car.

price.description: The price of the product in MNT.

stock.description: The number of items available in stock.

status.description: The current status of the product (e.g., 'active', 'archived').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the product details were last updated.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: Represents a user's intent to purchase a product.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Order entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who placed this order.

productId.description: Reference to the Product being purchased.

quantity.description: The number of items requested in this order.

totalPrice.description: The total price for this order in MNT.

status.description: The current status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'paid', 'failed').

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the order status was last updated.

definition.description: Stores user profiles including email and role.
Contains details for all products. Publicly readable, admin-only write access.
Stores orders placed by specific users. Access is restricted to the owning user or administrators.
